The '''''Liberty''''' was a [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]]. It was named in honor of [[Liberty/Legends|the MC80 Star Cruiser]] lost at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]

{{Ship-stub}}
